---
title: Le café
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779808026/Template_8_spvfhs.png
description: Des gens qui prennent le café
categories: ["generalillustration"]
date: 2026-01-10
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779808026/Template_8_spvfhs.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
